description: setAttribute gated sink: dangerous attrs fire, safe attrs suppressed, dynamic is conservative

expected.notes: document.location flows into setAttribute('href', ...) — DOM XSS
document.location flows into setAttribute('onclick', ...) — DOM XSS via event handler
setAttribute('class', ...) is safe — no sink activation
setAttribute('data-name', ...) is safe — no sink activation
setAttribute(attrName, ...) with dynamic arg — conservative policy fires sink
